productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Black T-shirt
description: Composition Black V-neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with embroidered branding on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron do not iron directly on print/embroidery This T-shirt from united colors of benetton brings the funk back in minimal styling with its hue and simple design. Wear this with a structured blazer, classic denims and casual leather shoes for an evening in the club. You can also wear this with your favourite jeans and canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
